steps.name: Verify the login page is open
$("by text: Log into Your Account") should be(visible)
Verify the projects page is open
Verify the projects page is open
Create project 'Gleichner Group' with multiple suites support
Verify the project creation form is open
$("[data-testid='addEditProjectAnnouncement'] .fr-element[contenteditable='true']") send keys(Omnis aut natus dolores laudantium repellat odit est.)
$("by text: Successfully added the new project.") should be(visible)

parameters.name: project
parameters.value: Project(name=Gleichner Group, description=Omnis aut natus dolores laudantium repellat odit est.)

steps.name: Verify the projects page is open
Go to Test Suites & Cases section
$("by text: Add Test Suite") should be(visible)
$("[data-testid='editSectionDescription'] .fr-element[contenteditable='true']") send keys(Magni ratione dolores sit itaque eligendi sint.)

parameters.name: suite
parameters.value: Suite(name=Suite_rerum, description=Magni ratione dolores sit itaque eligendi sint.)

steps.name: Verify the suite is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test suite")
Add test case 'Rerum repudiandae a corporis ut ut atque nulla.' to suite
Verify the test case creation form is open
Create test case 'Rerum repudiandae a corporis ut ut atque nulla.'
$("[data-testid='addEditCaseTitle']") set value(Rerum repudiandae a corporis ut ut atque nulla.)

parameters.name: testCase
parameters.value: TestCase(title=Rerum repudiandae a corporis ut ut atque nulla., section=, template=, type=, priority=)

parameters.name: testCase
parameters.value: TestCase(title=Rerum repudiandae a corporis ut ut atque nulla., section=, template=, type=, priority=)

steps.name: Verify the test case is created successfully
$("with text: Successfully added the new test case.") should be(visible)
Go to Test Runs & Results section
Open the test run creation form

parameters.name: run
parameters.value: TestRun(name=Run_consequatur, description=Voluptatibus qui aut ratione illum laudantium enim.)

steps.name: Verify the test run is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test run")
Export run results to Excel
